recent_articles.title: The Pulse: is GitHub still best for AI-native development?
recent_articles.preview: Availability has dropped to one nine (~90%), partly due to not being able to handle increased traffic from AI coding agents. There's also no CEO and an apparent lack of direction.
recent_articles.body_preview: Availability has dropped to one nine (~90%), partly due to not being able to handle increased traffic from AI coding agents. There's also no CEO and an apparent lack of direction.

recent_articles.title: Is the FDE role becoming less desirable?
recent_articles.preview: Job postings for Forward Deployed Engineers (FDEs) have surged, but many professionals don't want the role because it's more like solutions engineering than software development.
recent_articles.body_preview: Job postings for Forward Deployed Engineers (FDEs) have surged, but many professionals don't want the role because it's more like solutions engineering than software development.

recent_articles.title: The Pulse: Cloudflare rewrites Next.js as AI rewrites commercial open source
recent_articles.preview: An engineer at Cloudflare rewrote most of Vercel's Next.js in one week with AI agents. It looks like a sign of how AI will disrupt existing moats and business models.
recent_articles.body_preview: An engineer at Cloudflare rewrote most of Vercel's Next.js in one week with AI agents. It looks like a sign of how AI will disrupt existing moats and business models.

recent_articles.title: I replaced a $120/year micro-SaaS in 20 minutes with LLM-generated code
recent_articles.preview: Using an LLM, I managed to rewrite all the functionality I used to pay for in 20 minutes. Is this bad news for 'write once, don't update later' SaaS?

recent_articles.title: The grief when AI writes most of the code
recent_articles.preview: Exploring the emotional and professional impact when AI becomes the primary code author in software development.

recent_articles.preview: Analysis of Cloudflare's outage and the risks of global configuration changes in distributed systems.
